name: Eddy
description: Three-channel stereo submixer with CV control, sidechain compression, distortion, and normalized feedback filters. It covers clean mixing, feedback percussion, and aggressive bus processing in 8HP.

controls.name: Channel 1 level
controls.description: Sets the gain for the first stereo channel.

controls.name: Channel 2 level
controls.description: Sets the gain for the second stereo channel.

controls.name: Channel 3 level
controls.description: Sets the gain for the third stereo channel.

controls.name: Channel 4 / Sidechain level
controls.description: Sets the gain for the mono fourth input or sidechain path.

controls.name: Channel 1 mode switch
controls.description: Turns the channel on, inverts it, or mutes it.
controls.detail: up: on · center: invert · down: off

controls.name: Channel 2 mode switch
controls.description: Turns the channel on, inverts it, or mutes it.
controls.detail: up: on · center: invert · down: off

controls.name: Channel 3 mode switch
controls.description: Turns the channel on, inverts it, or mutes it.
controls.detail: up: on · center: invert · down: off

controls.name: OUT select switch
controls.description: Selects which mix bus appears at the main outputs.

controls.name: Sidechain switch
controls.description: Chooses whether the fourth input is mono audio or sidechain control.

inputs.name: CV In 4
inputs.description: Control voltage for the fourth mono or sidechain channel.

inputs.name: IN 4 / Sidechain
inputs.description: Mono fourth input or compressor sidechain input.

outputs.name: OUT L
outputs.description: Main left output, carrying the selected bus.

outputs.name: OUT R
outputs.description: Main right output, carrying the selected bus.

behaviors.name: Stereo submix
behaviors.trigger: patch audio into the three stereo channels
behaviors.description: The module behaves as a compact stereo submixer with per-channel gain and CV control.

behaviors.name: On / invert / off channel mode
behaviors.description: Each stereo channel can be passed normally, inverted, or muted, which makes the mixer useful for cancellation and widening tricks.

behaviors.name: Sidechain compression
behaviors.description: The fourth input can act as a sidechain source, so kick-driven ducking is available without a dedicated compressor.

behaviors.name: Output bus selection
behaviors.description: DIST, COMP, and MIX buses are all available on the same main outputs, so the final flavor can change without re-patching.

behaviors.name: Feedback normalization
behaviors.trigger: leave channels unpatched and raise the switches
behaviors.description: Unpatched channels can feed back internally, which makes no-input mixing and self-generating textures possible.

behaviors.name: Feedback percussion
behaviors.description: The internal bandpass feedback network is tuned for tone-shaping and percussion rather than textbook equalization.

patchIdeas.name: Clean stereo submix
patchIdeas.patch: Three stereo sources into channels 1-3 · OUT select on MIX · level pots around noon · use CV inputs for final automation on a compact stereo bus.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Eddy:
* OUT select: MIX
* Sidechain: IN4
* Channel 1 switch: on
* Channel 2 switch: on
* Channel 3 switch: on

VCO A:
VCO B:
Pad:
Output:

- VCO A (Out L) -> Eddy (IN 1 L)
- VCO A (Out R) -> Eddy (IN 1 R)
- VCO B (Out L) -> Eddy (IN 2 L)
- VCO B (Out R) -> Eddy (IN 2 R)
- Pad (Out L) -> Eddy (IN 3 L)
- Pad (Out R) -> Eddy (IN 3 R)
- Eddy (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Eddy (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Sidechain pump
patchIdeas.patch: Pads on channels 1-3 · kick into IN 4 as the sidechain source · OUT select on COMP · the mix ducks around the kick without extra patching.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Eddy:
* OUT select: COMP
* Sidechain: SCHAIN
* Channel 1 switch: on
* Channel 2 switch: on
* Channel 3 switch: on

Kick:
Pad:
Output:

- Pad (Out L) -> Eddy (IN 1 L)
- Pad (Out R) -> Eddy (IN 1 R)
- Pad (Out L) -> Eddy (IN 2 L)
- Pad (Out R) -> Eddy (IN 2 R)
- Pad (Out L) -> Eddy (IN 3 L)
- Pad (Out R) -> Eddy (IN 3 R)
- Kick (Out) -> Eddy (IN 4 / Sidechain)
- Eddy (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Eddy (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Distorted bus
patchIdeas.patch: OUT select on DIST · drive the input levels harder · use the invert switches to hollow the center or reinforce the sides before the bus clips.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Eddy:
* OUT select: DIST
* Channel 1 switch: on
* Channel 2 switch: invert
* Channel 3 switch: on

VCO A:
VCO B:
Output:

- VCO A (Out L) -> Eddy (IN 1 L)
- VCO A (Out R) -> Eddy (IN 1 R)
- VCO B (Out L) -> Eddy (IN 2 L)
- VCO B (Out R) -> Eddy (IN 2 R)
- Eddy (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Eddy (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: No-input feedback texture
patchIdeas.patch: Leave the main stereo inputs empty · raise the channel switches to engage the normalized feedback network · inject one mono source on IN 4 if you want the texture to lock to a pulse.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Eddy:
* OUT select: MIX
* Sidechain: IN4
* Channel 1 switch: on
* Channel 2 switch: on
* Channel 3 switch: on

Clock:
Noise:
Output:

- Clock (Out) t> Noise (Trig)
- Noise (Out) -> Eddy (IN 4 / Sidechain)
- Eddy (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Eddy (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Triple stereo VCA style sweep
patchIdeas.patch: Use the three stereo channels as a small voltage-controlled gain stage · animate all three CV inputs with envelopes for a wide moving mix before the output bus.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Eddy:
* OUT select: MIX
* Channel 1 switch: on
* Channel 2 switch: on
* Channel 3 switch: on

Envelope A:
Envelope B:
Envelope C:
VCO:
Output:

- Envelope A (Out) >> Eddy (CV In 1)
- Envelope B (Out) >> Eddy (CV In 2)
- Envelope C (Out) >> Eddy (CV In 3)
- VCO (Out L) -> Eddy (IN 1 L)
- VCO (Out R) -> Eddy (IN 1 R)
- Eddy (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Eddy (OUT R) -> Output (R)
